# ClaudeThings

> ClaudeThings is a paid toolkit for [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code) that drops a full AI engineering and marketing team into any project with one command — 89 specialized agents, 103 pre-built skills, and 181 slash commands. It works with any tech stack, adapts to your conventions via a CLAUDE.md file, and ships as two kits (Engineer + Marketing) you can install separately or together.

ClaudeThings is an independent, unofficial product. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Anthropic. "Claude" and "Claude Code" are trademarks of Anthropic. It is delivered as a private GitHub repository and installed with a one-line `npx github:claudethings/… init` command (no npm publish, no global install; Node 18+).

## What you get

- 89 specialized agents (58 engineering + 31 marketing)
- 103 pre-built skills (61 engineering + 42 marketing)
- 181 slash commands (159 engineering + 32 marketing; 10 shared docs commands counted once)
- Two kits: Engineer (the software team) and Marketing (the growth team)
- CLAUDE.md templates so agents learn your stack, conventions, and brand voice
- The `claudethings` installer CLI; cherry-pick any single agent, skill, or command
- Lifetime updates: buy once, run `claudethings update` (or `git pull`) forever

## Kits

- [Engineer kit](https://claudethings.com/#kits): 58 agents, 61 skills, 159 commands. Includes tech-lead, backend-architect, react-specialist, typescript-pro, python-pro, golang-pro, rust-pro, postgres-pro, kubernetes-specialist, terraform-specialist, sre-engineer, code-reviewer, test-automator, debugger, security-auditor, and commands like /api-scaffold, /test-coverage, /deploy-checklist.
- [Marketing kit](https://claudethings.com/#kits): 31 agents, 42 skills, 32 commands. Includes growth-strategist, brand-voice, seo-specialist, content-marketer, competitive-analyst, market-researcher, and commands like /campaign-brief, /blog-post, /email-sequence, /landing-page, /launch-plan.

## Pricing

- [Engineer](https://claudethings.com/#pricing): $49 one-time, lifetime updates.
- [Marketing](https://claudethings.com/#pricing): $49 one-time, lifetime updates.
- [Complete Bundle](https://claudethings.com/#pricing): $89 one-time (normally $129), both kits, all 89 agents / 103 skills / 181 commands.
- Every plan: one-time payment, lifetime updates, private-repo delivery, 14-day money-back guarantee. Secure checkout via Polar.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://claudethings.com/): product overview, what's inside, kits, pricing, FAQ.
- [Free tools](https://claudethings.com/tools): free browser tools and Claude skills for people building with Claude Code.
- [Pricing](https://claudethings.com/#pricing): plans and what each includes.
- [FAQ](https://claudethings.com/#faq): what you get, framework lock-in, updates, refunds.

## Free tools

- [SKILL.md Validator](https://claudethings.com/claude-skill-md-validator): paste a Claude Code SKILL.md and instantly lint the YAML frontmatter, name and description rules, body length, and when-to-use structure, with the exact fixes. Runs 100% in your browser.
- [Website Security Audit](https://claudethings.com/claude-skill-for-website-security-audit): a free Claude skill that audits your own website or codebase for missing HTTPS, exposed files, hardcoded secrets, and vulnerable dependencies, then returns a prioritized plain-English fix-it report.
